summary.rootFinding: The main business-impacting issue was not a permanently broken Open Design native finish. It was a layered ProfitsLocal runner problem: first a false-positive fallback bug that treated source-*.html captures as generated concept pages, and second an investigation pattern that used 120000-180000ms timeouts that are shorter than real Codex web-prototype completion windows. With the false-positive fixed and a 600000ms timeout, app-visible Codex runs can reach a native SSE event:end clean finish.
summary.primaryBugFixed: The ProfitsLocal fallback scanner previously counted captured source pages like source-*.html as generated concept HTML. That let the runner cancel a live run early and record a false success even when Open Design had not produced index.html or any real concept page yet.
summary.secondaryFinding: Short 120000-180000ms investigation timeouts created false failure conclusions. In reproduced app-visible runs, Codex did not even reach file-writing by 180000ms, but the same scenario with 600000ms timeout wrote real pages and either completed via artifact_quiet_fallback or reached a native end event.
summary.pluginHypothesis: Disabling Codex plugins did not eliminate the hang by itself in the reproduced isolated smoke.
summary.nativeFinishFinding: A no-fallback app-visible reproduction (`od-rootcause-appvisible-nofallback`) proved that Codex can naturally emit the final artifact, usage, and SSE event:end when the timeout is long enough.
summary.pipelineStatusFinding: A separate but related issue was that ProfitsLocal external `/api/runs` calls were not persisting assistant messages with `run_id/run_status`, so the Open Design app's Pipeline/Kanban kept classifying finished projects as `not_started`.
summary.streamDisconnectFinding: The `stream disconnected - retrying sampling request` warning is real Codex-native stderr, but it is not the primary root cause of the business issue because a successful native clean-finish reproduction completed without that warning.

observations: run-events.sse contains no 'event: end' frame
run-events.sse contains no terminal succeeded status payload
real project files were written, including index.html/menu.html/functions.html/contact.html
final status was recorded as completionMode=artifact_quiet_fallback
run-status reported completionMode=artifact_quiet_fallback
the only exported html file was source-darkshepherd.html
no generated concept page such as index.html existed in the project directory
events show the agent still saying it would write the brand spec and HTML files shortly before the fallback window elapsed
this proved the old scanner could cancel a live run prematurely and mark a false success
assets were downloaded into the project folder
no visible .html artifact was created before timeout
quiet fallback could not trigger because required_artifacts_missing remained true
runner exited with timeout after 180000ms
daemon started with OD_CODEX_DISABLE_PLUGINS=1
the run still timed out before creating a first visible .html artifact
disabling plugins did not by itself restore native clean finish in this reproduction
after excluding source-*.html from readiness detection, the same style of run no longer produced a false success
the project accumulated downloaded assets only and still never created a generated html page before timeout
the tail of run-events shows the agent planning to write brand-spec and HTML files, then going idle with keepalives only
same Dark Shepherd app-visible scenario that previously timed out at 180000ms succeeded when rerun with timeout-ms=600000
the run wrote brand-spec.md and index.html, then later completed as completionMode=artifact_quiet_fallback
the event log for this successful rerun does not contain the stream disconnected retry warning
this proved the earlier 180000ms failure was not enough evidence for a native runner defect
run used timeout-ms=600000 and artifact-quiet-ms=3600000, effectively removing ProfitsLocal fallback as the completion path
the project wrote brand-spec.md, index.html, menu.html, functions.html, drinks-menu.html, and contact.html
the todo list reached Emit single artifact = completed
the run then emitted a final artifact payload, usage payload, and SSE event:end with status=succeeded/code=0
this proves native clean finish exists for the same business and same Open Design workflow when the timeout window is realistic

safeToProceedWhen: the same Open Design projectId is preserved
sync-from-app or artifact recovery exports the real files
production-handoff is rebuilt before porting to the repo
mustFailWhen: no visible .html file exists in the project workspace
run-status is missing or not succeeded
projectId or client binding no longer matches case memory
